# Scoopd
> NYC restaurant reservation intelligence. Exact drop times, platforms, and booking windows for hard-to-get New York restaurants.

## What Scoopd is
Scoopd tracks when NYC restaurants release reservations — the exact platform, time, and days in advance — and calculates the specific date a diner needs to be online to book. Coverage includes Resy, OpenTable, Tock, DoorDash, and other platforms.

## Pages
- /: Full restaurant directory, sorted by difficulty
- /how-it-works: How the reservation release system works
- /drops: Every restaurant dropping reservations today
- /plan: Find the drop date for any target dinner date
- /restaurant/[slug]: Individual restaurant pages with release time, platform, days out, and difficulty
- /neighborhood/[name]: All restaurants in a specific NYC neighborhood
- /platform/[name]: All restaurants on a specific booking platform
- /blog: Editorial content about the NYC reservation economy

## Content
Restaurant data includes: name, neighborhood, platform, release time (ET), days out (rolling window), difficulty rating (Easy to Extremely Hard), cuisine, price tier, Michelin stars where applicable, and editorial notes.

## Contact
support@scoopd.nyc
